## The idea (or problem worth solving)

<!-- What's the real problem? Who has it? Keep it concrete. -->

## Who does this serve?

<!-- A wealth creator serves people. Name the real human on the other side. -->

## The four-question test

<!-- See docs/principles/values.md — be honest. -->
- [ ] Is it **true** / honest?
- [ ] Is it **legal** and within our word?
- [ ] Does it genuinely **serve** someone?
- [ ] Would you be **proud** to explain it to a kid?

## Run the 5W1H lens (optional but encouraged)

<!-- Point the six question-words at it — Who/What/Where/When/Why/How.
     Tip: an agent can do this — comment "/critical-thinking <the idea>" or run the
     critical-thinking-review workflow, and paste the verdict here. -->

## Who's needed to build it? (matching)

<!-- Check what this needs, so people can match in: -->
- [ ] 🛠️ Engineer
- [ ] 🎨 Designer
- [ ] 📈 Market / domain expert
- [ ] ✍️ Writer / educator
- [ ] 👨‍👩‍👧 Parent or kid to test it
- [ ] 🤖 AI agent / automation
